PingLess StudiosOpen-source infrastructure

XDP-native DDoS mitigation, developer tools, and networking utilities. Built and maintained by AnAverageBeing.

OpenShield-XDP
View on GitHub

OpenShield-XDP

DDoS mitigation at the NIC driver level. 42 detection vectors, suspicion scoring, SYNPROXY cookies, entropy spoofing detection. 10M+ PPS per core.

More Coming Soon

Additional open-source infrastructure tools and developer utilities in development. Room for networking, monitoring, and security projects.

Projects ​

OpenShield-XDP

XDP-native DDoS mitigation firewall. Inspects and drops attack traffic before the kernel allocates an skb. 42 detection vectors, 13 ban reason codes, 17 BPF maps, full TUI.

eBPFXDPGoDDoS

Your Project Here

This documentation hub is built to scale. Add your project under docs/ and configure the sidebar in .vitepress/config.ts.

extensible
